name: ExtensionDetectedIssue_Mitigation_Note
title: R5: Additional notes about the mitigation (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `DetectedIssue.mitigation.note` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`DetectedIssue.mitigation.note` 0..* `Annotation`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `DetectedIssue.mitigation.note` 0..* `Annotation`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `DetectedIssue.mitigation.note` has a context of DetectedIssue.mitigation based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `DetectedIssue`.
Element `DetectedIssue.mitigation.note` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: Additional notes about the mitigation (new)
element.comment:
Element `DetectedIssue.mitigation.note` has a context of DetectedIssue.mitigation based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `DetectedIssue`.
Element `DetectedIssue.mitigation.note` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.definition: Clinicians may add additional notes or justifications about the mitigation action. For example, patient can have this drug because they have had it before without any issues. Multiple justifications may be provided.
